name: stall-detection
description: Detects when issues go stale or agents get stuck. Prompts the CEO to unblock work automatically.

routines.title: Stall detection
routines.description: Routine-run checklist: inspect in_progress/in_review issues for stale activity, verify blockers and executionPolicy gates, record a concrete next action/reassignment/escalation on each stalled issue, summarize on the routine issue, then exit.
